text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Hanshin Juvenile Fillies is the G1 race that
decides the top junior-year runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But harder a race, the more demanding it is, and
the more strain it places on a racer's body.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Nishino Flower started her racing career
early and her body isn't as developed, the race
will likely exhaust her even more than her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to know how to properly care for her so
she can keep competing. But as a new trainer, I
have neither the knowledge nor experience. So to
remedy that...
choice_data_list: Thank you for meeting with me today!

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
There you are! I'm ready to go. You wanted to
talk about maintaining a racer's physical
condition, right? I've got all the info you need
here!

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I've also invited some alumni racers to join us. I'm
sure hearing about their training regimens will be
a good reference for you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What's the matter, Flower?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, it's Agnes Tachyon. She does a lot of
difficult research, but talking to her is fun.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Well, um...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You know, I've been meaning to talk to you
about my lab coat. It's been through so much, it's
basically a rag now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's both pitiful to look at and pitiful to wear.
Could you take a look at it for me?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: S-Sure! I'll do my best to help!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff... wheeze!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To prepare for the G1 race, I've increased the
intensity of Nishino Flower's training. Now, even
the regular routine completely exhausts her.
choice_data_list: Let's get you iced down, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you...
choice_data_list: And I made you a drink packed with vitamins!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: U-Um, thanks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I use what I learn from the senior trainer to take
care of Nishino Flower, but I still feel like my
grasp on the fundamentals isn't quite there yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I go looking for reference
materials about Umamusume physicalities and
anatomy.
Reading those books won't help you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What I mean to say is, books can only teach you
so much. You should be focusing more on
practical trial and error rather than pure theory.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon. Just a humble researcher.
Apologies for the abrupt intrusion, but I happen
to specialize in research on the Umamusume
body.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm. I knew it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're Flower's trainer, aren't you? You've been
doing a lot for her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As an upperclassman, I'd love to do anything I
can to assist my junior. My intentions are heartfelt
and good, I assure you!
choice_data_list: Please tell me everything you can!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry. I'll tell you all I know to help
ease the burden on Flower.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I do have one condition, but it's a minor little thing. No big deal. You simply have to imbibe a certain drink, then do some... light exercise for me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer's really late...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I'm sure the person I saw Trainer talking to the
other day was a senior trainer.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm still pretty new at this, you see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm still pretty new at this, you see.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe Trainer's doing more research for my
sake.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(It's all my fault Trainer is having such a hard
time, since I'm so small...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to keep you waiting, Flower. Your trainer
overdid things a bit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to keep you waiting, Flower. Your trainer
overdid things a bit.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong, Trainer?! And what are you doing
here, Tachyon?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, there was a bit of a mishap. All I wanted to
do was increase the amount of a certain
ingredient to see how it would affect
cardio-pulmonary function.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It was merely a light exercise test. However, it
seems he had the splendid and welcome
misapprehension that I would give him more
advice the harder he tried.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It was merely a light exercise test. However, it
seems she had the splendid and welcome
misapprehension that I would give her more
advice the harder she tried.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Thanks to that, I obtained some
excellent results indeed! And in exchange, I
provided a bevy of advice to help you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: To help me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now it's up to you two to do some trial and error
and see what works. I must get back to my
research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Consider this my thanks for your help with my lab
coat.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Because it's my fault you have to go through so
much...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to think that because of her smaller
size, my job is harder. Sure, it makes training her
more of a unique case, but in the end...
choice_data_list: I'm happy I get to do my best for your sake.
I'm happy I get to do my best for your sake.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I... know exactly how you feel.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...All right.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Take a break, Trainer. I'll go get you some water.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run after I get back, so be sure to
keep your eyes on me!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's sprint down the final stretch is
astounding to behold. She's improved a lot since
our training session yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew. Thank you...
choice_data_list: Have you been training in secret?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: No. But...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about how hard you've been
working for me filled me with strength!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Well, it felt that way, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've grown and improved so much because of you,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So thank you, for working so hard for my sake. I
appreciate everything you're doing!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But you're not the only one who wants to work
hard. I do too, so, um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Could you tell me what you learned today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm beyond nervous for our first G1 race, but so
long as I'm with Nishino Flower, I know we can get
through this together!
